textByHash.174610e49970a52b922ff3d004c96a935d00184a: Does it worry you that the life expectancy of a guard is about 30 seconds?
textByHash.2671494afb47bff562099bc6836bca8f071afd04: You won't last 2 minutes in the real world!
textByHash.42e515bb7c018dfe4ee2dcabeb49b39e8a1bc9d8: Let's get some proper bloodlust here!
textByHash.51f3ffd752316a0a49d46ab62c35cde396725cf0: What does it look like I'm doing? I'm training this useless bunch of recruits!
textByHash.6a35258719939c0340d4aa79b3c8d1de83c02532: They're nothing but a useless bunch of weaklings who won't survive an hour once they're out on patrol.
textByHash.71d1280931c18a166520e51db7a371201d7cbc1c: Hit the dummy before I come over there and hit you!
textByHash.9e771da5e93ab0b563b9e609f63a1f28944cdc16: Have you lost your mind? Earlier you said they looked weak! Just go away and leave me alone.
textByHash.a337c773195977e279cbf6e938a1d5c71a8085b6: Have you lost your mind? Earlier you said they looked fit! Just go away and leave me alone.
textByHash.afd2a5f7a96ce8e1a02fc206c3aadec35b9a334d: So you really want to be a guard, huh?
textByHash.b275b62e85c44ffe55f38e45cb77de6bc1523ec3: Bah, why do I bother with you lot?
textByHash.be9db3d1c7423bf80781d5097fcb3675c8762c7b: Hit the dummy! Hit the dummy!
textByHash.c369f44694cc5fddb4ffd59203f66afd39802265: Only guards of Varrock can wear this armour.
textByHash.d2f35abab5255f0bee8fd558ebb8aff759ed021d: Show some respect when you talk about my men, civilian!
textByHash.e395de412a458a8e55d6f12cec99e0cc6da0e33c: Bah! You just failed the intelligence test. Go away, civilian.
textByHash.e40708366cc7f0e504f0f9ed52a5a027759d8ef5: Oh yeah? I see you've got a Thieving level of . That must give you quite a long criminal record.
